---
title: "Custom Predictor Strategy"
description: "Inject a custom predictor that retains only the highest-scoring prediction"
author: "Karel Dieussaert"
date: "2026-03-31"
categories: [Prediction, Predictor, Advanced]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---
# Custom Predictor Strategy
This example extends `AlignerPredictor` and injects it into [Aligner](../reference/Aligner.qmd).

## What you learn
1. How to subclass the default predictor.
2. How to add custom selection logic after default scoring.
3. How to plug the predictor into `Aligner(...)`.

```{python}
{{< include ../../examples/example_custom_predictor_strategy.py >}}
```
